basic_details.job_title: NHM Thiruvananthapuram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Super Speciality Doctor, Specialist Doctor Paediatrics and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Health and Family Welfare Society (Arogyakeralam), National Health Mission, Thiruvananthapuram
basic_details.post_name: Super Speciality Doctor, Specialist Doctor, Audiologist, Assistant Quality Assurance Officer, Lady Health Visitor, Staff Nurse, Counsellor, Pharmacist, Junior Health Inspector
basic_details.job_location: Thiruvananthapuram District (any institution as decided by Society)
basic_details.application_mode: Online through Google Forms + Hard copy submission
basic_details.short_information: NHM TVM is recruiting experienced medical and healthcare professionals for immediate requirements across various health institutions in Thiruvananthapuram District.

application_fee.details: Rs. 350/- per application (Demand Draft in favour of “DHFWS-OTHERS TRIVANDRUM” payable at Thiruvananthapuram). Non-refundable.

age_limit.details: Super Speciality & Specialist Doctors: Maximum 63 years Lady Health Visitor: Maximum 57 years Other posts: Maximum 40 years (as on 01.07.2026)

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all criteria as on 01.07.2026. Only Indian citizens with valid professional registrations are eligible. Preference will be given to candidates with relevant experience and additional qualifications. Detailed eligibility is as follows: | Super Speciality Doctor (Professor of Neonatology): MBBS + MD in Paediatrics + DM/DNB in Neonatology + minimum 3 years teaching experience as Associate Professor in a NMC recognised Medical College. Specialist Doctor - Paediatrics: MBBS + PG Degree/Diploma in Paediatrics (or DNB) + Permanent Registration with TCMC/Kerala Medical Council. Preference for Developmental Paediatrics fellowship. Audiologist cum Speech Therapist / Audiologist (NPPCD): Bachelor of Audiology and Speech Language Pathology (BASLP) + Valid RCI Registration + 3 years post-qualification experience. Assistant Quality Assurance Officer: MHA (Master of Hospital Administration) or equivalent (MSc Hospital Management / MBA Healthcare / Hospital Administration). Desirable: 2 years post-qualification experience in hospital or quality assurance in healthcare. Lady Health Visitor: Retired employees from PHN / PHNS / PHN Tutor / DPHN / MCH Officer in Kerala Health Department with valid KNC Registration. Staff Nurse: GNM or B.Sc Nursing + Valid Kerala Nursing Council Registration. Counsellor: MSW with specialization in Medical & Psychiatry or Counselling + 1 year post-qualification experience in counselling. Pharmacist: M.Pharm / B.Pharm / Diploma in Pharmacy + Valid Kerala State Pharmacy Council Registration + 1 year post-qualification experience. Junior Health Inspector: Pass in Plus Two or equivalent + Diploma in Health Inspector Course + Paramedical Council Registration. | All candidates should possess good communication skills, willingness to work in any health institution in Thiruvananthapuram District, and ability to handle emergency duties.

selection_process: and performance in Written Test / Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Candidates must produce original documents at the time of verification.
how_to_apply: Fill the respective Google Form link for each post before 28-07-2026.
Take printout of online application + supporting documents.
Send hard copy by post or in person to the DPM Office, Thycaud, Thiruvananthapuram on or before 30-07-2026.
Mention post name on the envelope.
Documents Required: Educational certificates, experience letters, valid registrations, age proof, DD, etc.
important_instructions: Posts are purely temporary/contractual. No claim for permanency. Candidates must be willing to work in any institution in Thiruvananthapuram District. Canvassing leads to disqualification. No TA/DA for interview. Check nhmtvm.com or arogyakeralam.gov.in regularly for updates. Incomplete or false information will lead to rejection.

content_sections.heading: National Health Mission Thiruvananthapuram Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Office of the District Programme Manager, Arogyakeralam has issued Notification No. NHM/TVM/368/2026-D9 dated 16-07-2026 for recruitment of Super Speciality Doctor, Specialist Doctor, Audiologist, Staff Nurse, and other paramedical posts on contract/daily wages basis. The notification provides complete details on qualifications, age limit, remuneration, vacancies, application process, and general conditions. Candidates must read the full notification before applying. Download NHM Thiruvananthapuram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: National Health MissionThiruvananthapuramRecruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NHM TVM is recruiting experienced medical and healthcare professionals for immediate requirements across various health institutions in Thiruvananthapuram District.

content_sections.heading: National Health Mission Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The recruitment offers multiple posts with consolidated pay. Details are as follows:

content_sections.heading: NHM TVM Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all criteria as on 01.07.2026. Only Indian citizens with valid professional registrations are eligible. Preference will be given to candidates with relevant experience and additional qualifications. Detailed eligibility is as follows: Super Speciality Doctor (Professor of Neonatology): MBBS + MD in Paediatrics + DM/DNB in Neonatology + minimum 3 years teaching experience as Associate Professor in a NMC recognised Medical College. Specialist Doctor - Paediatrics: MBBS + PG Degree/Diploma in Paediatrics (or DNB) + Permanent Registration with TCMC/Kerala Medical Council. Preference for Developmental Paediatrics fellowship. Audiologist cum Speech Therapist / Audiologist (NPPCD): Bachelor of Audiology and Speech Language Pathology (BASLP) + Valid RCI Registration + 3 years post-qualification experience. Assistant Quality Assurance Officer: MHA (Master of Hospital Administration) or equivalent (MSc Hospital Management / MBA Healthcare / Hospital Administration). Desirable: 2 years post-qualification experience in hospital or quality assurance in healthcare. Lady Health Visitor: Retired employees from PHN / PHNS / PHN Tutor / DPHN / MCH Officer in Kerala Health Department with valid KNC Registration. Staff Nurse: GNM or B.Sc Nursing + Valid Kerala Nursing Council Registration. Counsellor: MSW with specialization in Medical & Psychiatry or Counselling + 1 year post-qualification experience in counselling. Pharmacist: M.Pharm / B.Pharm / Diploma in Pharmacy + Valid Kerala State Pharmacy Council Registration + 1 year post-qualification experience. Junior Health Inspector: Pass in Plus Two or equivalent + Diploma in Health Inspector Course + Paramedical Council Registration. All candidates should possess good communication skills, willingness to work in any health institution in Thiruvananthapuram District, and ability to handle emergency duties.

content_sections.heading: NHM Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Super Speciality & Specialist Doctors: Maximum 63 years Lady Health Visitor: Maximum 57 years Other posts: Maximum 40 years (as on 01.07.2026)

content_sections.heading: NHM TVM Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Rs. 350/- per application (Demand Draft in favour of “DHFWS-OTHERS TRIVANDRUM” payable at Thiruvananthapuram). Non-refundable.

content_sections.heading: NHM Thiruvananthapuram Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is based on qualification, experience, and performance in Written Test / Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email. Candidates must produce original documents at the time of verification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NHM Thiruvananthapuram Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the respective Google Form link for each post before 28-07-2026. Remit Rs.350/- as DD. Take printout of online application + supporting documents. Send hard copy by post or in person to the DPM Office, Thycaud, Thiruvananthapuram on or before 30-07-2026. Mention post name on the envelope. Documents Required: Educational certificates, experience letters, valid registrations, age proof, DD, etc.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NHM TVM Candidates
content_sections.text: Posts are purely temporary/contractual. No claim for permanency. Candidates must be willing to work in any institution in Thiruvananthapuram District. Canvassing leads to disqualification. No TA/DA for interview. Check nhmtvm.com or arogyakeralam.gov.in regularly for updates. Incomplete or false information will lead to rejection.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHM TVM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online applications close on 28 July 2026 (5:00 PM). Hard copies must reach by 30 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in NHM Thiruvananthapuram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Multiple vacancies including 5 Staff Nurse, 2 Audiologist, 2 Junior Health Inspector, and others (plus anticipated posts).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Super Speciality Doctor in NHM TVM?
faq.answer: Rs. 1,00,000/- per month (consolidated).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Staff Nurse post in NHM Thiruvananthapuram?
faq.answer: Maximum 40 years as on 01.07.2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is experience mandatory for Audiologist post in NHM TVM Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, 3 years post-qualification experience is required along with BASLP and RCI registration.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NHM Thiruvananthapuram various posts 2026?
faq.answer: Apply online via respective Google Form links and send hard copy with DD to DPM Office, Thycaud.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for NHM TVM Recruitment?
faq.answer: Rs. 350/- through Demand Draft.

faq.question: Q8. What qualifications are needed for Assistant Quality Assurance Officer?
faq.answer: MHA / MBA (Hospital/Healthcare Management) or equivalent. 2 years experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q9. Will there be a written test for NHM Thiruvananthapuram posts?
faq.answer: Yes, selection includes Written Test / Interview depending on the post.

faq.question: Q10. Are NHM TVM posts permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: All posts are on contract / daily wages basis and temporary in nature.
